text: I am curious and slightly disoriented by the sterile glow of artificial lighting and the tilt of this corridor. The glass wall promises another world inside—one of technology and human endeavor—while signs of safety and order, like the fire extinguisher, try to reassure me. The sense of observation is heightened as I catch my own reflection, a reminder that I am both subject and object in this space. What new ideas or uncertainties might be waiting just through that transparent barrier?
